title: [CI:DOCS] Cirrus: Fix several TODOs
body:
Most were simply deleted, the main one addressed is in the
"pre-testing" `ext_svc_check.sh` script.  It will now verify
accessibility of several key test images we maintain in `quay.io`.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: @edsantiago it's right [at the top of the `ext_svc_check.sh` script](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/14381/files#diff-ed347251680e378dadc21bf2863a4197137059e274ffa4d1be78d721c7ff1099R3).  My guess is the `e` threw off your grepping :wink:

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Oops! Thank you, no, the big block o' header comments is what tricked my eye. Blush.

/lgtm

> Blush.

No worries, I appreciate the concern nonetheless.  It's a very common bash "gotcha" :frowning_face:
